name: Task Creation & Validation
description: Responsible for creating new AgentTask instances with correct defaults, validating user input, and preparing tasks for feature mode. Also handles CLAUDE.md generation for new projects.

Managers/TaskFactory.cs.content:
class TaskFactory
  ValidateTaskInput(string? description) -> bool
  PrepareTaskForFeatureModeStart(AgentTask task) -> void
  GenerateLocalSummary(string description) -> string
  GenerateClaudeMdAsync(string projectPath, bool isGame, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) -> Task<string>
